00_strategy/00_arunika_strategy_master.h.description:
Ini adalah pusat kendali visi Arunika Institute. Semua kebijakan dan operasional harus selaras dengan pilar-pilar di bawah ini. Filosofi_dan_Identitas: Nilai dasar dan asal-usul brand.
Visi_Misi_Arunika: Arah jangka panjang lembaga.
Core_Values_Arunika: Budaya kerja dan karakter profesional.
Metode_Pembelajaran: Formula "The Arunika Way".
Niche_dan_Diferensiasi: Apa yang membuat kita berbeda.
INSIDIA.canvas: Sebagai Platform bagi Siswa
Track Progress: 10_Arunika_Milestones_Checklist
Produk/Layanan: 20_Arunika_Programs_Master

00_strategy/niche_dan_diferensiasi.html.title: Niche_dan_Diferensiasi
00_strategy/niche_dan_diferensiasi.html.icon: <svg class="svg-icon lucide-file" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" height="24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 22a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2.4 2.4 0 0 1 1.704.706l3.588 3.588A2.4 2.4 0 0 1 20 8v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"></path><path d="M14 2v5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h5"></path></svg>
00_strategy/niche_dan_diferensiasi.html.description: Arunika Institute tidak hanya menjual skill teknis, tetapi menjual standar baru dalam profesionalisme digital. Masalah: Banyak talenta digital jago teknis tapi buruk dalam komunikasi dan etika kerja. Solusi: Sertifikasi khusus yang menjamin lulusan memiliki integritas, etika komunikasi digital, dan profesionalisme berkelas. Konsep: Setiap lulusan wajib menyelesaikan proyek teknologi yang memberikan dampak sosial nyata. Tujuan: Membangun portofolio yang memiliki "jiwa" dan kepedulian sosial, bukan sekadar baris kode atau desain. Jaringan eksklusif yang menghubungkan kurikulum langsung dengan kebutuhan real-time industri dan pengakuan akademis. Back to: 00_Arunika_Strategy_MasterKeunggulan Unik (Niche) Digital Etiquette Certification: Pelopor sertifikasi etika digital dan integritas profesional. Sociopreneur Project: Tugas akhir wajib berupa solusi teknologi untuk masalah nyata di masyarakat.

00_strategy/visi_misi_arunika.html.title: Visi_Misi_Arunika
00_strategy/visi_misi_arunika.html.icon: <svg class="svg-icon lucide-file" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" height="24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 22a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2.4 2.4 0 0 1 1.704.706l3.588 3.588A2.4 2.4 0 0 1 20 8v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"></path><path d="M14 2v5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h5"></path></svg>
00_strategy/visi_misi_arunika.html.description: Visi: Menjadi ekosistem talenta digital terdepan di Indonesia. Misi: Pelatihan global, The Arunika Triangle, dan Character Building. Back to: 00_Arunika_Strategy_Master

10_milestone/10_arunika_milestones_check.title: 10_Arunika_Milestones_Checklist
10_milestone/10_arunika_milestones_check.icon: <svg class="svg-icon lucide-file" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" height="24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 22a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2.4 2.4 0 0 1 1.704.706l3.588 3.588A2.4 2.4 0 0 1 20 8v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"></path><path d="M14 2v5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h5"></path></svg>
10_milestone/10_arunika_milestones_check.description:
PIC: Bagaskara Mahardhika Rukmana Status: 🟢 In Progress Tujuan: Memastikan operasional settle dalam 12 bulan pertama. Fokus pada kesiapan fisik dan izin operasional. Izin LPK: Menyelesaikan pengurusan legalitas Lembaga Pelatihan Kerja. Digital Marketing Lab: Instalasi PC, software SEO, dan analytics tools. Smart Classroom: Pemasangan layar interaktif dan sistem konferensi. Staffing: Penandatanganan kontrak dengan praktisi industri (70%) dan akademisi (30%). Kurikulum V.1: Dokumen modul pelatihan siap cetak untuk program pilot. Fokus pada validasi pasar dan pengenalan "The Arunika Way". Launching Website: Portal resmi arunikainstitute.ac.id aktif. Pilot Workshop: Eksekusi 1-2 kelas Arunika BOOST (2-5 hari). MoU Perguruan Tinggi: Kerjasama formal dengan 1 universitas untuk konversi SKS. Sertifikasi Etika: Standarisasi ujian "Digital Etiquette & Professional Identity". Fokus pada pelaksanaan program intensif. Arunika PRO Batch 1: Pembukaan pendaftaran program intensif (3-6 bulan). Multimedia Studio: Studio green screen dan audio recording siap digunakan. Sociopreneur Kick-off: Siswa mulai merancang proyek solusi sosial digital. Arunika Career Center: Layanan bimbingan karir dan database lowongan aktif. Fokus pada pembuktian janji brand (Penyerapan Kerja). Graduation Batch 1: Pelaksanaan kelulusan dan pameran portofolio. Job Placement: Sinkronisasi lulusan dengan HRD mitra industri. Impact Report: Dokumentasi keberhasilan "Sociopreneur Project" untuk stakeholder. Roadmap IoT Lab: Finalisasi anggaran untuk pengadaan Lab IoT di tahun ke-2. Links: Kembali ke Strategi: 00_Arunika_Strategy_Master
Detail Layanan: 20_Arunika_Programs_Master
Ekosistem Mitra: 30_Arunika_Resources_Master
Log Harian: 40_Arunika_Task_PIC

10_milestone/q1_details.html.title: Q1_details
10_milestone/q1_details.html.icon: <svg class="svg-icon lucide-file" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" height="24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 22a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2.4 2.4 0 0 1 1.704.706l3.588 3.588A2.4 2.4 0 0 1 20 8v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"></path><path d="M14 2v5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h5"></path></svg>
10_milestone/q1_details.html.description: Verifikasi NIB dan KBLI pada sistem OSS RBA agar sesuai dengan bidang pelatihan digital. Penyusunan profil lembaga yang mencakup visi, misi, struktur organisasi, dan kurikulum. Penyiapan dokumen administrasi sarana dan prasarana penunjang pelatihan. Pengajuan berkas melalui portal Dinas Tenaga Kerja terkait. Koordinasi dan pendampingan saat visitasi verifikasi lapangan oleh instansi berwenang. Pengadaan dan instalasi perangkat keras (PC/Laptop) dengan spesifikasi teknis minimal. Instalasi sistem operasi dan perangkat lunak pendukung (Browser, SEO Extension, Design Tools). Aktivasi akun perangkat lunak analisis (SEO Tools dan Analytics) untuk modul praktik. Pengujian stabilitas jaringan internet dengan alokasi bandwidth minimal per terminal kerja. Penyusunan inventarisasi aset laboratorium. Instalasi Interactive Flat Panel (IFP) atau alat penampil digital pada posisi ergonomis. Integrasi sistem audio dan kamera untuk kebutuhan konferensi video jarak jauh. Kalibrasi sistem input sentuh dan konektivitas perangkat nirkabel. Penyusunan instruksi manual pengoperasian perangkat bagi instruktur. Rekrutmen praktisi aktif (70%) berdasarkan portofolio dan pengalaman industri terkini. Rekrutmen akademisi (30%) berdasarkan kompetensi pedagogi dan latar belakang pendidikan. Pelaksanaan wawancara dan uji kompetensi mengajar. Penandatanganan kontrak kerja yang memuat klausul kerahasiaan kurikulum dan kode etik. Pelaksanaan sesi orientasi mengenai metode pembelajaran The Arunika Way. Peninjauan ulang modul ajar agar selaras dengan komposisi 60% Praktik, 30% Teori, dan 10% Karakter. Validasi materi oleh panel ahli atau praktisi senior di bidang terkait. Standarisasi format desain dan tata letak dokumen kurikulum sesuai identitas lembaga. Penggandaan dokumen modul ajar untuk kebutuhan peserta program pilot. Koneksi Proyek: Milestone Utama: 10_Arunika_Milestones_Checklist

20_programs/20_arunika_programs_master.h.title: 20_Arunika_Programs_Master
20_programs/20_arunika_programs_master.h.icon: <svg class="svg-icon lucide-file" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" height="24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 22a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2.4 2.4 0 0 1 1.704.706l3.588 3.588A2.4 2.4 0 0 1 20 8v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"></path><path d="M14 2v5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h5"></path></svg>
20_programs/20_arunika_programs_master.h.description:
Semua program di Arunika Institute wajib mengacu pada formula 60% Praktik, 30% Teori, dan 10% Karakter. Arunika PRO: Program intensif untuk kesiapan kerja (Long-term).
Arunika BOOST: Program peningkatan skill untuk profesional (Short-term).
Arunika LEAD: Program strategis untuk level manajemen (Executive). Links:
Kembali ke Strategi: 00_Arunika_Strategy_Master
Cek Progress Launching: 10_Arunika_Milestones_Checklist

20_programs/arunika-boost.html.title: Arunika BOOST
20_programs/arunika-boost.html.icon: <svg class="svg-icon lucide-file" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" height="24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 22a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2.4 2.4 0 0 1 1.704.706l3.588 3.588A2.4 2.4 0 0 1 20 8v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"></path><path d="M14 2v5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h5"></path></svg>
20_programs/arunika-boost.html.description: Tagline: "Upgrade Skill, Boost Your Career"Short-course atau workshop intensif berdurasi 2-5 hari yang ditujukan bagi mereka yang ingin memperdalam satu skill spesifik secara cepat. Advanced Social Media Analytics. Mastering TikTok Ads for Business. Copywriting with AI Integration. Personal Branding for Professionals. 20_Arunika_Programs_Master

20_programs/arunika-lead.html.title: Arunika LEAD
20_programs/arunika-lead.html.icon: <svg class="svg-icon lucide-file" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" height="24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 22a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2.4 2.4 0 0 1 1.704.706l3.588 3.588A2.4 2.4 0 0 1 20 8v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"></path><path d="M14 2v5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h5"></path></svg>
20_programs/arunika-lead.html.description: Tagline: "Lead with Digital Vision"Program eksklusif untuk pemilik bisnis (Owner), Manager, atau Pengambil Keputusan untuk memahami cara mengelola tim dan strategi di era digital. Digital Transformation Leadership. Data-Driven Decision Making. Cyber Security Awareness for Managers. Ethical AI in Business. 20_Arunika_Programs_Master

20_programs/arunika-pro.html.title: Arunika PRO
20_programs/arunika-pro.html.icon: <svg class="svg-icon lucide-file" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" height="24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 22a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2.4 2.4 0 0 1 1.704.706l3.588 3.588A2.4 2.4 0 0 1 20 8v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"></path><path d="M14 2v5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h5"></path></svg>
20_programs/arunika-pro.html.description: Tagline: "From Learner to Earner"Program pelatihan intensif selama 3-6 bulan yang dirancang untuk menghasilkan lulusan yang siap langsung terjun ke dunia industri. Digital Marketing: SEO, Social Media Ads, & Content Strategy. Multimedia: Video Production, Motion Graphics, & UI/UX. Information Technology: Full Stack Development. Internet of Things (IoT): Smart System & Robotics (Fase Lanjutan). Portofolio proyek riil. Sertifikasi Digital Etiquette & Professional Identity. Proyek Akhir: Sociopreneur Project (Solusi digital untuk masalah sosial). 20_Arunika_Programs_Master

30_resource/30_arunika_resources_master..description:
Untuk mencapai target penyerapan kerja 70-80% di tahun pertama, Arunika Institute bergantung pada tiga pilar sumber daya utama. Mitra_Industri: Penyedia Live Project, tempat magang, dan penyerapan lulusan.
Mitra_Akademik: Kolaborasi dengan kampus untuk riset dan konversi SKS.
Fasilitas_Infrastruktur: Laboratorium fisik dan studio penunjang praktek 60%. Links:
Cek Hubungan dengan Program: 20_Arunika_Programs_Master
Kembali ke Strategi: 00_Arunika_Strategy_Master

30_resource/fasilitas_infrastruktur.html.description: Lokasi: Jl. A.H Nasution No. 75 KM 7 Alat: High-spec PC, High-speed internet. Software: SEO tools (Ahrefs/Semrush), Analitik, Ads Manager. Alat: Green screen, Camera DSLR/Mirrorless, Lighting kit, Mic Recording. Fungsi: Produksi konten untuk tugas siswa dan unit bisnis internal. Alat: Interactive Whiteboard, Sound System, Video Conf. kit. Alat: Microcontrollers (Arduino/ESP32), Sensors, 3D Printer. 30_Arunika_Resources_Master |

30_resource/mitra_akademik.html.icon: <svg class="svg-icon lucide-file" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" height="24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 22a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2.4 2.4 0 0 1 1.704.706l3.588 3.588A2.4 2.4 0 0 1 20 8v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"></path><path d="M14 2v5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h5"></path></svg>
30_resource/mitra_akademik.html.description: Status: Outreach Phase Konversi SKS: Memungkinkan mahasiswa mengambil kursus di Arunika yang diakui oleh kampus asal. Dosen Tamu: Mengundang akademisi untuk mengisi porsi 30% teori aplikatif. Research Sharing: Kolaborasi riset di bidang IT dan IoT. Universitas di area Bandung Timur/Mandalajati (Prioritas Lokal). Sekolah Vokasi/SMK untuk program akselerasi. 30_Arunika_Resources_Master

30_resource/mitra_industri.html.title: Mitra_Industri

30_resource/mitra_industri.html.description: Status: In Mapping Startup & Tech Companies: Untuk penempatan lulusan Full Stack Web & IoT. Digital Agencies: Untuk proyek magang mahasiswa Digital Marketing & Multimedia. Corporate Partners: Untuk program pelatihan karyawan (Arunika LEAD). Startup lokal Bandung (Tech/Agrotech). Agensi kreatif untuk suplai aset multimedia. BUMN/Swasta untuk program CSR berbasis Sociopreneur Project. 30_Arunika_Resources_Master

File ini digunakan untuk mencatat progres harian agar selaras dengan target di 10_Arunika_Milestones_Checklist. info_showCustomIcons.description: Show custom icons for files and folders

info_showDefaultFolderIcons.description: Show a default icon of a folder for every folder in the tree

info_showDefaultFileIcons.description: Show a default icon of a file for every file in the tree

info_defaultFolderIcon.description: The icon to use for folders. Prefix with 'lucide//' to use a Lucide icon

info_defaultFileIcon.description: The icon to use for files. Prefix with 'lucide//' to use a Lucide icon

info_defaultMediaIcon.description: The icon to use for media files. Prefix with 'lucide//' to use a Lucide icon

info_exposeStartingPath.description: Whether or not to show the current file in the file tree when the page is first loaded

info_selector.description: CSS selector for an element. The feature will be placed relative to this element.

info_type.description: Will this feature be placed before, after, or inside (at the beggining or end).

info_featurePlacement.description: Where to place this feature on the page. (Relative to the selector)

info_displayTitle.description: Descriptive title to show above the feature

info_selector.description: CSS selector for an element. The feature will be placed relative to this element.

info_type.description: Will this feature be placed before, after, or inside (at the beggining or end).

info_featurePlacement.description: Where to place this feature on the page. (Relative to the selector)

info_displayTitle.description: Descriptive title to show above the feature

info_minCollapseDepth.description: Only allow outline items to be collapsed if they are at least this many levels deep in the tree.

info_selector.description: CSS selector for an element. The feature will be placed relative to this element.

info_type.description: Will this feature be placed before, after, or inside (at the beggining or end).

info_featurePlacement.description: Where to place this feature on the page. (Relative to the selector)

info_displayTitle.description: Descriptive title to show above the feature

info_selector.description: CSS selector for an element. The feature will be placed relative to this element.

info_type.description: Will this feature be placed before, after, or inside (at the beggining or end).

info_featurePlacement.description: Where to place this feature on the page. (Relative to the selector)

info_displayTitle.description: Descriptive title to show above the feature

info_showOrphanNodes.description: Show nodes that are not connected to any other nodes.

info_showAttachments.description: Show attachments like images and PDFs as nodes in the graph.

info_allowGlobalGraph.description: Allow the user to view the global graph of all nodes.

info_allowExpand.description: Allow the user to pop-out the graph view to take up the whole screen

info_attractionForce.description: How much should linked nodes attract each other? This will make the graph appear more clustered.

info_linkLength.description: How long should the links between nodes be? The shorter the links the more connected nodes will cluster together.

info_repulsionForce.description: How much should nodes repel each other? This will make disconnected parts more spread out.

info_centralForce.description: How much should nodes be attracted to the center? This will make the graph appear more dense and circular.

info_edgePruning.description: Edges with a length above this threshold will not be rendered, however they will still contribute to the simulation. This can help large tangled graphs look more organised. Hovering over a node will still display these links.

info_minNodeRadius.description: How small should the smallest nodes be? The smaller a node is the less it will attract other nodes.

info_maxNodeRadius.description: How large should the largest nodes be? Nodes are sized by how many links they have. The larger a node is the more it will attract other nodes. This can be used to create a good grouping around the most important nodes.

info_allowResizing.description: Whether or not to allow the sidebars to be resized

info_allowCollapsing.description: Whether or not to allow the sidebars to be collapsed

info_rightDefaultWidth.description: The default width of the right sidebar

info_leftDefaultWidth.description: The default width of the left sidebar

info_selector.description: CSS selector for an element. The feature will be placed relative to this element.

info_type.description: Will this feature be placed before, after, or inside (at the beggining or end).

info_featurePlacement.description: Where to place this feature on the page. (Relative to the selector)

info_sourcePath.description: The local path to the source .html file which will be included.

info_allowFoldingLists.description: Whether or not to allow lists to be folded

info_allowFoldingHeadings.description: Whether or not to allow headings to be folded

info_siteUrl.description: The url that this site will be hosted at

info_authorName.description: The name of the author of the site

bodyClasses: publish css-settings-manager styled-scrollbars show-inline-title show-ribbon is-focused
